inputs.label: Total Renovation Area (sq ft)
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total floor area to be renovated, including all rooms and corridors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm odalar ve koridorlar dahil olmak üzere yenilenecek toplam taban alanı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte zu renovierende Grundfläche, einschließlich aller Räume und Flure.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale au sol à rénover, y compris toutes les pièces et couloirs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie total a renovar, incluyendo todas las habitaciones y pasillos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي مساحة الأرضية المراد تجديدها، بما في ذلك جميع الغرف والممرات.

inputs.label: Scope Complexity
inputs.businessContext: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.

businessContext_i18n.en: Low: cosmetic only; Medium: structural and MEP changes; High: full gut renovation with new systems.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşük: sadece kozmetik; Orta: yapısal ve MEP değişiklikleri; Yüksek: yeni sistemlerle tamamen boşaltma yenilemesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Niedrig: nur kosmetisch; Mittel: strukturelle und MEP-Änderungen; Hoch: Komplettsanierung mit neuen Systemen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Faible : cosmétique uniquement ; Moyen : changements structurels et MEP ; Élevé : rénovation complète avec nouveaux systèmes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Baja: solo cosmética; Media: cambios estructurales y MEP; Alta: renovación completa con nuevos sistemas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: منخفضة: تجميلية فقط؛ متوسطة: تغييرات هيكلية وميكانيكية وكهربائية؛ عالية: تجديد كامل مع أنظمة جديدة.

inputs.label: Material Quality Tier
inputs.businessContext: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Economy: budget finishes; Standard: mid-range; Premium: high-end, sustainable materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekonomi: bütçe kaplamaları; Standart: orta sınıf; Premium: yüksek kaliteli, sürdürülebilir malzemeler
businessContext_i18n.de: Economy: günstige Oberflächen; Standard: mittlere Preisklasse; Premium: hochwertige, nachhaltige Materialien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Économique : finitions budgétaires ; Standard : milieu de gamme ; Premium : matériaux haut de gamme et durables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Económico: acabados básicos; Estándar: gama media; Premium: materiales sostenibles de alta gama.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اقتصادي: تشطيبات محدودة؛ قياسي: متوسط؛ فاخر: مواد عالية الجودة ومستدامة.

inputs.label: Labor Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average labor hours per square foot based on historical data and crew productivity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş verilere ve ekip verimliliğine dayalı olarak metrekare başına ortalama işçilik saati
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Arbeitsstunden pro Quadratfuß basierend auf historischen Daten und Produktivität des Teams.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de main-d'œuvre moyennes par pied carré basées sur les données historiques et la productivité de l'équipe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra promedio por pie cuadrado basadas en datos históricos y productividad del equipo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط ساعات العمل لكل قدم مربع بناءً على البيانات التاريخية وإنتاجية الفريق.

inputs.label: Waste Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected material waste percentage due to cutting, errors, and over-ordering.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, hatalar ve fazla sipariş nedeniyle beklenen malzeme fire yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Materialabfallprozentsatz durch Zuschnitt, Fehler und Überbestellung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de déchets de matériaux attendu dû à la coupe, aux erreurs et aux surcommandes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de desperdicio de material debido a cortes, errores y pedidos excesivos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الهدر المتوقعة في المواد بسبب القطع والأخطاء والطلب الزائد.

inputs.label: Contingency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).

businessContext_i18n.en: Budget reserve for unforeseen issues (e.g., hidden damage, code upgrades).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öngörülemeyen sorunlar (ör. gizli hasar, yönetmelik yükseltmeleri) için bütçe rezervi
businessContext_i18n.de: Budgetreserve für unvorhergesehene Probleme (z. B. versteckte Schäden, Code-Upgrades).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réserve budgétaire pour les imprévus (par exemple, dommages cachés, mises à niveau du code).
businessContext_i18n.es: Reserva presupuestaria para imprevistos (p. ej., daños ocultos, actualizaciones de código).
businessContext_i18n.ar: احتياطي الميزانية للمشكلات غير المتوقعة (مثل الأضرار المخفية، تحديثات الكود).

inputs.label: Regional Cost Index
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for local labor and material cost variations (1.0 = national average).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel işçilik ve malzeme maliyeti farklılıkları için çarpan (1,0 = ulusal ortalama)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für lokale Arbeits- und Materialkostenschwankungen (1,0 = nationaler Durchschnitt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour les variations locales des coûts de main-d'œuvre et de matériaux (1,0 = moyenne nationale).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de variaciones locales de mano de obra y materiales (1,0 = media nacional).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف لتفاوت تكاليف العمالة والمواد المحلية (1.0 = المتوسط الوطني).

inputs.label: Sustainability Target
inputs.businessContext: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: If pursuing certification, additional costs for documentation, commissioning, and materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sertifikasyon hedefleniyorsa, dokümantasyon, devreye alma ve malzemeler için ek maliyetler
businessContext_i18n.de: Bei Zertifizierungsanstrengungen zusätzliche Kosten für Dokumentation, Inbetriebnahme und Materialien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si poursuite de la certification, coûts supplémentaires pour la documentation, la mise en service et les matériaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si se busca certificación, costes adicionales por documentación, puesta en marcha y materiales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كنت تسعى للحصول على شهادة، تكاليف إضافية للتوثيق والتشغيل والمواد.

rules.message: Combined waste and contingency exceeds 40% – review project risk assumptions.
High complexity scope requires at least 0.1 hours/sq ft labor efficiency.
Sustainability certification typically requires at least standard material quality.

thresholds.message: Projected cost exceeds 120% of baseline – consider scope reduction or value engineering.
Waste factor above 20% indicates potential process inefficiencies – apply Lean principles.
Labor efficiency factor > 0.3 hours/sq ft – investigate crew training or workflow bottlenecks.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
